articles.description: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi, just 15, shocked cricket fans by hitting two sixes off Jasprit Bumrah during the RR vs MI encounter. His explosive 14-ball 39 drew accolades from Ajay Jadeja and sparked excitement about his talent on social media.

topStories.title: Congress flags fuel crisis in Karnataka, hits at Centre
topStories.description: Senior Congress leaders criticized the Centre for mismanaging LPG and fuel supply in Karnataka, causing transport disruptions and a livelihood crisis.

topStories.title: ‘Time will answer’: Congress leaders downplay buzz on power shuffle in Karnataka
topStories.description: Deputy CM DK Shivakumar sidesteps leadership change speculation as Congress campaigns for by-elections, asserting decisions rest with CM and party leadership.

topStories.title: Belonging to backward community is no ground for favour in government employment: Supreme Court
topStories.description: The court emphasised that recruitment processes, especially those involving large-scale public employment, must adhere strictly to notified conditions.

topStories.title: Iran War Timeline: Key moments, strikes and warnings before the ceasefire announced by Donald Trump
topStories.description: The war in West Asia trigerred with the US and Israel launching strikes across Iran, hitting a government compound in Tehran and military targets. Iran’s supreme leader, Ayatollah Khamenei, and other high-level military and intelligence leaders were killed.

topStories.title: Backward status no ground for favour in govt employment: SC
topStories.description: The Supreme Court ruled that belonging to a backward community cannot guarantee employment, emphasizing fairness in public recruitment processes.

topStories.title: Iran-US Deal: Is The Strait of Hormuz Open After Ceasefire?
topStories.description: Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi said safe passage through the Strait of Hormuz can be ensured for two weeks, provided military attacks on Iran cease.

topStories.title: Netanyahu Backs US Decision For Iran Ceasefire, Says "Lebanon Not Included"
topStories.description: Netanyahu Backs US Decision For Ceasefire With Iran, But Says "Lebanon's Hezbollah Not Included"

topStories.title: What we know about the two-week US and Iran ceasefire
topStories.description: The provisional truce comes more than a month after the US and Israel launched coordinated attacks on Iran.

dailyNews.title: FBI Warned US Of Iran's "Persistent Threat", White House Downplayed It
dailyNews.description: The FBI warned U.S. state and local law enforcement of an elevated threat posed by Iran's government to targets in the United States

dailyNews.title: Oil Price Today (April 8): Crude oil price crashes 15% as Trump agrees 2-week ceasefire with Iran. What are experts saying?
dailyNews.description: Brent Crude oil price: Oil prices plummeted below $100 a barrel following President Trump's announcement of a two-week ceasefire with Iran, contingent on the safe reopening of the Strait of Hormuz. This development, averting a potential escalation, saw Brent crude fall to $94.43 and WTI to $96.82.

dailyNews.title: ‘Donald Trump surrendered’: Iran brutally trolls US president with new video after war ceasefire | Watch
dailyNews.description: An Iranian animation team has trolled President Trump with a Lego-style video post-ceasefire, emphasising the TACO narrative that he backed down.

dailyNews.title: Now-deleted NCERT chapter on judiciary was a collective effort, Professor tells Supreme Court
dailyNews.description: In an affidavit to the Supreme Court, Michel Danino said the chapter was the result of a “collective and collaborative” process with no individual authorship.

dailyNews.title: 'Will not be repeated': US Journalist Shelly Kittleson freed after 9 days held by Iran-backed Iraqi militia
dailyNews.description: Iraqi militia Kataib Hezbollah freed American journalist Shelly Kittleson on Tuesday, ending a nine-day ordeal that had drawn urgent diplomatic pressure from Washington and Baghdad, but the group warned the gesture would not be repeated.

dailyNews.title: Shehbaz Sharif ‘running a peace startup': Amid ‘draft’ row, Pakistan PM gets trolled over post on US-Iran ceasefire
dailyNews.description: A temporary ceasefire in the US-Iran war is underway, following Donald Trump's announcement of a two-week suspension of attacks. Meanwhile, Pakistan PM Shehbaz Sharif's post has sparked strong reactions.

dailyNews.title: Trump announces two-week ceasefire as Iran agrees to reopen Hormuz Strait - Al Jazeera
dailyNews.description: Trump announces two-week ceasefire as Iran agrees to reopen Hormuz Strait  Al Jazeera

dailyNews.title: Bombings, threats, and last-minute phone calls: How events unfolded hours before Trump's 2-week Iran war ceasefire
dailyNews.description: Just before Trump’s Tuesday deadline, the United States and Israel struck key infrastructure in Iran with Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu saying attacks hit railways and bridges allegedly used by the Revolutionary Guards.

dailyNews.title: Iran-US Ceasefire: Pete Hegseth press conference on Operation Epic Fury today - when and where to watch
dailyNews.description: United States and Iran agreed to a two-week ceasefire Tuesday barely an hour before President Donald Trump's deadline to obliterate the rival country was set to expire, with Tehran to temporarily reopen the vital Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: US-Iran war ceasefire LIVE updates: US, Israel and Iran agree to ceasefire, talks begin on Friday
dailyNews.description: US-Iran war ceasefire LIVE updates: The US, Israel and Iran have agreed to a two-week ceasefire.Donald Trump eases his stance just hours before his escalation deadline. Talks begin on Friday in Islamabad

dailyNews.title: Did Iran open the Strait of Hormuz? Here's what Abbas Araghchi said after Trump's ceasefire announcement
dailyNews.description: In the statement shared by Araghchi, Iran added that 'for a period of two weeks, safe passage through the Strait of Hormuz will be possible via coordination with Iran's Armed Forces and with due consideration of technical limitations.'

dailyNews.title: US-Iran Ceasefire: Lindsey Graham says Congress would need to approve proposal to ‘end’ Iran war
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump announced Tuesday that he had agreed to suspend imminent attacks on Iranian infrastructure for a period of two weeks, stepping back from earlier threats to target Iran’s “whole civilization”.

dailyNews.title: Iran ceasefire deal a temporary win for Trump - but it comes at a cost
dailyNews.description: The path to the two-week ceasefire with Iran may have fundamentally altered the way the rest of the world views the US.

dailyNews.title: Trump-backed Republican Clay Fuller wins election to replace Marjorie Taylor Greene
dailyNews.description: He will serve out the rest of Marjorie Taylor Greene's term, which ends in January 2027.

dailyNews.title: US and Iran agree to 2-week ceasefire as Trump seizes diplomatic offramp instead of escalation
dailyNews.description: Iran’s demands for ending the war include control of the strait, the withdrawal of US combat forces from the region, the lifting of sanctions and the release of its frozen assets.

dailyNews.title: US-Iran Ceasefire: Tehran says it has ‘forced’ Trump to accept its ‘10-point plan’ - What does it include?
dailyNews.description: A Pakistani-brokered pause on the brink of war has opened a narrow diplomatic window between Washington and Tehran- but Iran's conditions for a lasting settlement are sweeping, and its warnings pointed.

dailyNews.title: Oil slides after Trump agrees to conditional two-week Iran ceasefire
dailyNews.description: Trump announced the deal not long before a deadline for a Tuesday evening ultimatum for Iran was reached.

dailyNews.title: Trump suspends bombing campaign for two weeks, says Iran's ten-point proposal is workable
dailyNews.description: US President Donald Trump has suspended the ‘bombing and attack’ on Iran, announcing a two-week double-sided ceasefire after accepting a 10-point proposal from Iran

dailyNews.title: Meryl Streep criticises Melania Trump’s fashion, questions expectations on women in power
dailyNews.description: Meryl Streep recently criticised Melania Trump’s fashion choices, calling them politically loaded. Speaking ahead of The Devil Wears Prada 2, she also spoke about how women in power are still shaped by expectations.

dailyNews.title: Pope Leo calls out Trump’s Iran rhetoric before last-minute ceasefire emerges
dailyNews.description: Pope Leo called President Trump's threat against Iran 'truly unacceptable,' urging world leaders to return to the negotiating table and reject war always.

dailyNews.title: Trump-backed Republican pads GOP's fragile House majority by winning showdown for MTG's former seat
dailyNews.description: Republican Clay Fuller wins Georgia's 14th Congressional District special election, reinforcing the GOP's slim 218-214 House majority for Speaker Johnson.

dailyNews.title: Biden wanted to drive reliable energy 'into a ditch,' says Trump Energy Secretary
dailyNews.description: Energy Secretary Chris Wright claimed Tuesday that the Biden administration was driving the U.S. energy system "into a ditch" through massive subsidies.

dailyNews.title: Trump agrees to 2-week ceasefire if Iran opens Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump announces a two-week delay of a planned Iran strike following talks with Pakistani leaders and progress toward a potential agreement with Iran.
